intro: Over the two weeks from 13 to 26 April 2026, ZCyberNews published 21 articles under the cloud-security tag. The coverage identified APT41 as a top threat actor and highlighted CVE-2026-33413, a vulnerability with a CVSS score of 8.8. Affected sectors included technology, government, healthcare, cloud services, and cloud-services, while the observed regions were Global and Israel. The severity mix across these reports comprised 12 high-severity, 3 informational, and 2 critical-severity items.
